name: Permutations Calculator
description: Calculate permutations of n items taken r at a time.
seo_description: Use our free permutations calculator to quickly estimate perm based on n, r. Not registration needed.
result_context: The permutations {perm} count the number of ways to arrange r items from n when order matters.
mistakes: Using combinations formula instead of permutations
Allowing r > n which giv is invalid results
Confusing when order matters vs doesn't matter
desc: Free online permutations calculator. Enter n total and r chosen to get instant results.
